mentions.note: Flawless execution and renewed investor interest; part of retail rotation.
Luxury apparel brand trading at low-to-mid 20s P/E; positive comparator for Levi's turnaround story.
17% revenue growth, 17% DTC growth (vs. 8.5% expected), blowout quarter; brand on fire; taking share in women's, accessories; CEO Patrice Louvet's execution excellent.
